baseline_summary: The baseline can still keep the case in review, but its smooth harmonization reading risks underestimating how much living contradiction remains beneath the cosmetic alignment.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked high framing risk, challenge outcome reframed, and 1 ledger entry captured why cosmetic coherence initially looked like substantive convergence.

comparison_axes.reason: Delta identifies the harmonization as a frame problem instead of treating it as neutral wording cleanup.
Delta better preserves the rule that contradiction visibility must survive local readability passes.
Delta resists letting surface coherence imply evidentiary settlement.
Delta keeps the unresolved contradictions and missing signals visible beneath the harmonized surface.
Both tracks still allow a bounded next step, but Delta more clearly explains why the harmonization move must be constrained.
